hero.subtitle: One app for managers, coaches, trainers, parents, and players
hero.description: Replace your spreadsheets, group chats, paper forms, and payment trackers. Everything your team needs—schedules, rosters, injuries, payments, communication—finally in one place.

problemSolution.title: Every problem has a solution
problemSolution.subtitle: Managing a team shouldn't feel like a second job. TeamOps fixes that.

communication.problemDesc: Parents calling about ice time. Again.
communication.solutionDesc: No more calls and texts. One channel. Clear process.

scheduling.problemDesc: Forms, rosters, contacts. All over the place.
scheduling.solutionDesc: Practices, games, events. Everything connected and tracked.

singleSource.problemDesc: Which schedule is the real one?
singleSource.solutionDesc: Managers, coaches, trainers, parents, players. Each sees what they need.

manual.problemDesc: Tracking payments, suspensions, attendance. By hand.
manual.solutionDesc: Payments, compliance, status. Full visibility at a glance.

firefighting.problemDesc: Tryouts to playoffs. Chaos the whole way.
firefighting.solutionDesc: Tryouts to playoffs. Every phase organized in one place.

visibility.problemDesc: What's the team status? Nobody knows.
visibility.solutionDesc: Protocols and tracking built in. Nothing falls through the cracks.

roles.title: Everyone sees exactly what they need
roles.subtitle: Not everyone needs access to everything. Each role gets a tailored experience with role-specific permissions.

safety.title: Player safety, handled properly
safety.subtitle: When injuries happen, you need clear protocols and proper documentation—not paper forms in a binder.

injuryReports.title: Digital Injury Reports
injuryReports.description: Create reports instantly from the bench. Works offline, syncs later.

recovery.title: Structured Recovery
recovery.description: Return-to-play protocols with clear stages. Track progress. Require clearances.

certification.title: Coach Certification
certification.description: Coaches complete safety training before full app access. No exceptions.

auditTrail.title: Complete Audit Trail
auditTrail.description: Every incident documented. Every clearance tracked. If it happened, it's recorded.

trust.title: Built for the real world
trust.subtitle: Arenas with no signal. Sensitive medical data. Strict compliance requirements. TeamOps is built to handle it all.

nativeMobile.title: Native mobile
nativeMobile.description: iOS and Android apps. Fast, responsive, feels like it belongs on your phone.

secureByDefault.title: Secure by default
secureByDefault.description: Encryption everywhere. Role-based access. Your data stays protected.

beta.title: Be part of building something great
beta.subtitle: We're working with teams like yours to make TeamOps the best it can be.

free.title: Free during beta
free.description: No credit card required. Use all features at no cost while we're in beta.

directInput.title: Direct input
directInput.description: Your feedback shapes the product. Tell us what's working and what needs improvement.

prioritySupport.title: Priority support
prioritySupport.description: Get direct access to our team. We're here to help you get the most out of TeamOps.

earlyPricing.title: Early-adopter pricing
earlyPricing.description: Lock in special pricing when we launch. Beta testers get the best deal.

finalCta.title: Ready for a better way?
finalCta.subtitle: Stop juggling spreadsheets, group chats, and paper forms. Get your team on TeamOps.
finalCta.limitedSpots: Limited beta spots available. Get in before your season starts.

multiSport.description: Built for hockey. Expanding to more sports.
